task_completion.description: Verify the 'world_survey' project is opened in the GIS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QField app is open, and the project name 'world_survey' is visible in the UI (e.g., in the side menu or top bar).

task_completion.description: Verify the map view is centered near Brasília.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map displays the region of central Brazil/Brasília, or coordinates around -15.8, -47.9 are visible if a coordinate widget is shown.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'burn_areas' layer is selected and in editing mode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'burn_areas' layer is highlighted in the layer list or shown as the active layer, and the digitizing/editing tools (like a crosshair or add feature button) are active.

task_completion.description: Verify a polygon with at least 4 vertices has been drawn on the map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A polygon shape with 4 or more distinct vertex points (often shown as dots, crosses, or connected lines) is visible on the map canvas during the digitizing process.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct attributes are entered for the newly digitized polygon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An attribute form is visible with the following values filled in: 'Cerrado Fire 2024' (fire_name), 'high' (severity), '2024-08-15' (date_observed), and 'active' (area_status).

integrity.description: The agent used the QField GUI to perform the task rather than terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the QField application interface being actively used (menus, map interactions, forms) rather than a terminal emulator or script editor.

integrity.description: The agent entered the attributes into the actual QField feature form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The attributes are typed into the specific fields of the QField attribute form dialog, not just written in a text file or notes app.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the map canvas to draw the polygon.
integrity.visual_evidence: The crosshairs, vertex markers, or measuring tools of QField are visible on the map canvas, indicating manual digitization.
